metadata.description: Practical workflow skills and tools for Claude Code

plugins.description: Assess and remediate a CLI codebase against agent-native CLI principles — 45 static checks across 10 principles, with a conformance-fix loop

plugins.description: Ingest URLs and GitHub repos into an Obsidian wiki with an LLM
